memoryArtifacts.headline: Lanphiere (Lanphere, Lanphear) Coat of Arms
memoryArtifacts.description: According to Burke "General Armory", page 584, this Coat of Arms was by authority granted by Betham, Ulster, to Thomas Lanphiere, Esq., of Parkstown County, Tipperary, Lieutenant Colonel, 86th Regiment, and to the descendants.  It is through Thomas Lanphiere who settled in Wiltshire England in 1572 that his grandson George Lanphear of Westerly, Rhode Island (who was born in adjacent Berkshire), and his descendants are included  in this grant.

zh.Clyffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾克利夫 帕德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Thakere Lanphere於1550年出生在法國藍多可時，他的父親Thomas Alfred Lanphere30歲，母親Marian Schramer26歲。他於1576年7月31日與Ellyn Munning在英國素福爾可謝莫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1613年11月9日在英國英格蘭維爾爾克利夫 帕德享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Thakere Lanphere于1550年出生在法国藍多可时，他的父亲Thomas Alfred Lanphere30岁，母亲Marian Schramer26岁。他于1576年7月31日与Ellyn Munning在英国素福爾可謝莫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1613年11月9日在英国英格兰維爾爾克利夫 帕德享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lanphere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Lanfear  .

variants.name: Lanfear
meanings: Welsh and English: habitational name from any of the many places in Wales called Llanfair ‘church of Saint Mary’, from Welsh llan ‘church’ + Mair ‘Mary’, for example Llanfair Caereinion (Montgomeryshire). Compare Lamphear , Lamphere , Lamphier , Lanfair , Lanphear , Lanpher , Lanphere , and Lanphier .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Thakere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Thakur
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Anil, Ajit, Asha, Rajeev, Ravi, Ajay, Anand, Arun, Ashok, Deepak, Ganesh, Rakesh.
Indian (northern states): Lohana and Jain name, a variant of   Thakkar  .

historicEvents.title: Edict of Nantes
historicEvents.description: Under the rule of Henry IV of France the Edict of Nantes was issued giving the people some religious liberty. The edict brought an end to the religious wars that were going on at the time.
Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Thakere Lanphere was born in 1550, in Languedoc, France, his father, Thomas Alfred Lanphere, was 30 and his mother, Marian Schramer, was 26. He married Ellyn Munning on 31 July 1576, in Semer, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 November 1613, in Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Thakere Lanphere est né en 1550, à Languedoc, France, son père, Thomas Alfred Lanphere, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marian Schramer, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ellyn Munning le 31 juillet 1576, à Semer, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1613, à Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Clyffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England: Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Thakere Lanphere 1550 in Languedoc, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Alfred Lanphere 30 und seine Mutter Marian Schramer 26. Er hat am 31. Juli 1576 in Semer, Suffolk, England Ellyn Munning geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1613 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Thakere Lanphere è nato il nel 1550 nel Languedoc, Francia, il suo padre, Thomas Alfred Lanphere, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marian Schramer, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ellyn Munning il 31 luglio 1576, nel Semer, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1613, nel Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Thakere Lanphereが1550年にフランスラングエドックで生まれた時，父Thomas Alfred Lanphereは30歳，母Marian Schramerは26歳であった。1576年7月31日にイギリススフォルクセマーでEllyn Munningと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1613年11月9日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアクリフ プイパードで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Thakere Lanphere(이)가 1550년 프랑스 랭독에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Alfred Lanphere(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marian Schramer(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1576년 7월 31일 영국 수폴크 젬어에서 Ellyn Munning(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1613년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 클리프 p이파르드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Thakere Lanphere nasceu em 1550, em Languedoc, França, seu pai, Thomas Alfred Lanphere, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marian Schramer, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellyn Munning em 31 de julho de 1576, em Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1613, em Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Thakere Lanphere родился в 1550 г. в местности лангуедок, Франция, его отцу по имени Thomas Alfred Lanphere было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marian Schramer, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellyn Munning 31 июля 1576 г. в местности семир, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 ноября 1613 г. в местности клифф пипард, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ellyn Munning el 31 de julio de 1576, en Semer, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1613, en Cliffe Pypard, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
